candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; identical to Net sales and preferable from candidate list.
Not revenue; expense line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of sales
candidates.why: COGS subcomponent, not revenue.
Ancillary revenue, not total top-line.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability line, not revenue.

variables.notes: R:nc. Used candidate-list label 'Total Revenue' and additionally included 'Net sales' from the full preview as a fallback/prioritized alternate because both appear to represent the same top-line across years. Added outside candidate list, so manual review is required. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net sales

candidates.why: Direct cost line and standard COGS label.
Subcomponent of cost of sales, not preferable when full Cost of sales exists.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.

candidates.why: Only a subcomponent of COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the main COGS line rather than subcomponents.

candidates.why: Core SG&A component above operating profit.

Core SG&A component above operating profit.
Subcomponent, less preferable than full line.

Generic overhead bucket, but less preferable when explicit selling/admin lines exist.

Operating metric, not expense row.

Same concept with alternate capitalization, likely used in some years.

Capitalized asset, not current expense.

variables.notes: Selected dedicated R&D expense lines above operating profit as priority alternatives across years.

Recurring finance cost line; include since no more granular detail is shown for 2023.

Not finance cost.

Equity line, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Summed granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded total net finance costs to avoid double counting. Excluded supplemental lease-interest line as duplicate.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the Parent Company

Includes non-controlling interests, less preferred if parent equity exists.
Share count, not equity amount.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

Equivalent alternate label; useful as priority fallback.
